sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in sources

special_mechanics.name: 8-directional movement with rotary joystick control
special_mechanics.description: Player can move in 8 directions independently from facing direction. Joystick rotation allows character to face direction separate from movement direction, enabling attack in any direction while moving differently.

special_mechanics.name: Vehicle commandeering - Tanks
special_mechanics.description: Players can commandeer enemy tanks which are immune to enemy bullets but have limited fuel supply. Tanks sustain damage when fuel depletes or caught in explosions. Player must exit tank and escape before detonation.

special_mechanics.name: Vehicle commandeering - Helicopters (NES version)
special_mechanics.description: Helicopters available in NES version with two weapon types: spread gun and cannon. Can fly over water obstacles.

special_mechanics.name: Tracking fire pressure mechanic
special_mechanics.description: If player takes too long moving up screen, computer initiates 'call for fire' - a red spot appears below player tracking fire to accelerate gameplay pace.

tier_notes: Tier 2: No detailed movement physics documentation available. Sources confirm run-and-gun gameplay with 8-directional movement and rotary joystick control, but no quantitative physics parameters (speeds, accelerations, gravity values) are documented in available sources.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Ikari Warriors (NES)
